svg.title: Mayo Scheduling Assistant — Patient Experience
svg.text: Branded · multilingual · voice-ready · grounded in mayoclinic.org

g.text: Request, prepare, or change a visit
Most patients can request online or by phone.
The page itself reacts, not a link out
EN + ES · chrome, voice in, read-aloud
Every claim links to a KB source
› Refuses to invent numbers or policies
› No medical advice · no PHI handling
› Copy or email the full transcript
